subject: Fw: Library position

have miles lay out on top of hill today

Hello, 
  
Here is the schematic plan of the library layout as per the last modifications Mr. Epstein did on the model in Paris. 
There is also a plan with an outline of the buildings with overall dimensions and X and Y coordinates of 4 reference points. 
  
Please let me know if any further information is needed. 
  
Sincerely,
